title: Sequelize vs Mongoose Quiz
description: Compare and contrast the leading Node.js ORM and ODM.

questions.question: Which of these is an ORM for relational databases like PostgreSQL?
What is Mongoose primarily used for?
Which provides better native support for strict relationships and JOIN operations?
When is Mongoose a better choice than Sequelize?
options: When data is relational and requires strict integrity
When data is unstructured or has a rapidly changing schema
When you only have access to a SQL server
When you are not using Node.js
